_run_timestamp: Timestamp when this mart row was produced by Dataform.
session_id: GA4 session identifier. Grain of this mart is one row per session_id.
session_date: Session date in the configured local reporting timezone.
user_pseudo_id: GA4 user pseudo ID associated with the session.
landing_page_location: Full landing page URL captured for the session landing page.
landing_page_path: Path component of the session landing page.
landing_content_group: Landing page content group from GA4 session modeling.
source: GA4 session source from first-session attribution fields.
medium: GA4 session medium from first-session attribution fields.
campaign: GA4 session campaign name from first-session attribution fields.
campaign_id: GA4 session campaign ID when available.
term: GA4 session term value, often used as keyword/adset carrier depending on platform tagging.
content: GA4 session content value, often used as creative/ad carrier depending on platform tagging.
landing_campaign_id: Numeric campaign ID extracted from landing URL utm_id. For Meta, this is the preferred campaign join key when present.
landing_adset_id: Meta ad set ID extracted from landing URL adset_id when Meta URL templates provide it.
landing_ad_id: Meta ad ID extracted from landing URL ad_id when Meta URL templates provide it.
is_meta_matching_excluded_url: True when the landing URL/path contains 'alarm'. These sessions are treated as out of scope for managed Meta matching quality because alarm/alarmas campaigns are not managed in this reporting scope.
meta_matching_exclusion_reason: Reason the session is excluded from Meta match-quality denominators. Current value: alarm_url_out_of_scope.
is_meta_matching_eligible: True when the session source is Meta-like and the URL is not excluded. Use this as the denominator for Meta GA4-to-Ads match quality.
default_channel_grouping: GA4 default channel grouping for the session.
session_gclid: Google Click ID used for deterministic Google Ads matching when present.
session_dclid: DoubleClick click ID captured on the session when present.
session_srsltid: Google organic shopping/search result ID captured on the session when present.
session_gbraid: Google gbraid identifier captured on the session when present.
session_wbraid: Google wbraid identifier captured on the session when present.
session_msclkid: Microsoft Ads click ID captured on the session when present.
lnd_source: GA4 last-non-direct source for the session.
lnd_medium: GA4 last-non-direct medium for the session.
lnd_campaign: GA4 last-non-direct campaign name for the session.
lnd_campaign_id: GA4 last-non-direct campaign ID for the session.
lnd_default_channel_grouping: GA4 last-non-direct default channel grouping for the session.
matched_platform: Paid platform that matched this session deterministically. Values include google_ads, meta_ads, or null.
match_method: Deterministic match method used for paid enrichment. google_gclid means Google click ID; meta_url_ids means Meta campaign matched through landing URL IDs; meta_name_fallback means Meta matched through campaign name; none means no paid-platform match.
channel: Canonical reporting channel derived from paid-platform matches first, then click IDs, then GA4 channel grouping.
matched_account_id: Paid-platform account ID/name surrogate associated with the matched paid session.
matched_account_name: Paid-platform account name associated with the matched paid session.
matched_campaign_id: Paid-platform campaign ID associated with the matched paid session.
matched_campaign_name: Paid-platform campaign name associated with the matched paid session.
matched_ad_group_or_adset_id: Google ad group ID or Meta ad set ID associated with the matched paid session when available.
matched_ad_group_or_adset_name: Google ad group name or Meta ad set name associated with the matched paid session when available.

paid_attribution.description: Structured paid-media attribution detail for the matched session.

google_ads.description: Google Ads match detail populated when the session matched by gclid.

columns.matched_date: Google Ads click/performance date used for the match.
columns.keyword_text: Google Ads keyword text from click mapping when available.
columns.keyword_match_text: Google Ads matched keyword text when available.
columns.keyword_match_type: Google Ads keyword match type when available.

meta_ads.description: Meta Ads match detail populated when the session matched by Meta campaign ID/name and optional adset/ad IDs.

columns.matched_date: Meta Ads reporting date used for the match.
columns.account_id: Meta account identifier from the configured Meta source.
columns.account_name: Meta account name from the configured Meta source.
columns.ad_account_name: Meta ad account name from the configured Meta source.
columns.campaign_id: Meta campaign ID matched from landing URL utm_id or campaign-name fallback.
columns.campaign_name: Meta campaign name from the configured Meta source.
columns.adset_id: Meta ad set ID matched from landing URL adset_id or name fallback when available.
columns.adset_name: Meta ad set name from the configured Meta source.
columns.ad_id: Meta ad ID matched from landing URL ad_id or name fallback when available.
columns.ad_name: Meta ad name from the configured Meta source.
